assertionResults.observation: The mandatory-fresh command started a new chain, deployment, isolated indexer services, analytics, and web using the matching manifest epoch.
Strict health accepted only exact RPC, indexer, and analytics head and block-hash parity with served runtime identity.
One controlled empty block propagated to exact three-way parity without stale-epoch application data.
Teardown left zero owned listeners, process records, containers, and volumes; restart reused no prior state.

environment.stack: Owned Feather full stack with strict health
